intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把机场噪音、被动语态、补偿提议和最后的 stubborn choice 读出来。

sentences.text: Aeroplanes are slowly driving me mad.
sentences.focus_zh: driving me mad 是日常夸张，表示噪音快把我烦坏了；slowly 要读出一点点累积的压力。

sentences.text: I live near an airport and passing planes can be heard night and day.
sentences.focus_zh: can be heard 是被动语态；night and day 是日夜不停。

sentences.text: The airport was built years ago, but for some reason it could not be used then.
sentences.focus_zh: was built 和 could not be used 都是被动；for some reason 是由于某种原因。

sentences.text: Last year, however, it came into use.
sentences.focus_zh: came into use 是开始使用、开始运营；however 前后要读出转折。

sentences.text: Over a hundred people must have been driven away from their homes by the noise.
sentences.focus_zh: must have been driven away 是对过去的强烈推测加被动语态，表示肯定已经被噪音逼走了。

sentences.text: Sometimes I think this house will be knocked down by a passing plane.
sentences.focus_zh: will be knocked down 是被动语态；这里是夸张想象，不是事故场面。

sentences.text: I have been offered a large sum of money to go away, but I am determined to stay here.
sentences.focus_zh: have been offered 是我被提供了一个条件；but 后面要读出 determined to stay 的坚定。

sentences.text: Everybody says I must be mad and they are probably right.
sentences.focus_zh: probably right 是疲惫又自嘲的结尾，不是生气，也不是严肃诊断。
